title: Tangy Indian Fritter Bites
description: Crunchy fritters filled with a flavorful tangy Indian-inspired mixture, perfect as a snack or appetizer.
instructions: 1. In a bowl, whisk together flour, yogurt, ginger paste, garam masala powder, cumin powder, and red chili powder.
2. Add the diced tomatoes and mix well.
3. Add the Indian-style fritter mix and mix until a dough forms.
4. Divide the dough into small balls, about 1-inch diameter.
5. Heat about 2-3 inches of oil in a deep frying pan over medium heat.
6. When the oil is hot, add a few fritter balls to the pan (do not overcrowd).
7. Fry the fritters until they are golden brown, about 2-3 minutes on each side.
8. Remove the fritters from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
9. Serve the fritters hot with your favorite chutney or sauce.
10. Repeat the frying process with the remaining fritter balls.
